description_long: This object is a vintage-style Texaco gas pump, featuring a tall, rectangular metal body painted in red with black trim and visible weathering. The front displays a circular Texaco logo sign at the top, a metallic display panel, and a hose with a nozzle attached to the side. In front of the pump are three additional items: a white propane tank, a red jerry can, and two small red and yellow oil cans, all arranged in a row. The pump's surface shows signs of age, with chipped paint and rust, and the Texaco branding is prominent on both the sign and the body. The back and sides of the pump are mostly plain red, with the hose and nozzle visible on the rear. The overall appearance is industrial and utilitarian, evoking a mid-20th-century roadside gas station aesthetic.
description: A weathered, vintage Texaco gas pump in red with a circular logo sign, accompanied by a propane tank, jerry can, and oil cans. The pump features a hose, nozzle, and metallic display panel, with visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Texaco logo sign, display panel, hose, nozzle, and all accessory containers (propane tank, jerry can, oil cans) clearly arranged in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pump, the round sign's profile, and the alignment of the propane tank and jerry can beside the pump.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red back of the pump, with the accessory containers (propane tank, jerry can, oil cans) more visible and the hose not in view.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the hose and nozzle attached to the back side of the pump, with no accessory containers visible.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage-style fuel pump, painted red with black trim, featuring a circular Texaco logo sign on top, a metallic display panel, and a single hose with nozzle attached to the side. No digital displays are present; branding is prominent.
attribute_station_signage: A circular Texaco logo sign is mounted on top of the pump, red with a white background and green star, clearly visible from the front and side. Additional Texaco branding is present on the pump body.
